abilities.name: Incandescent Awakening
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon has a Memory Capsule attached, Grass Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Abilities.

abilities.name: Torrential Awakening
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon has a Memory Capsule attached, Fire Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Abilities.

abilities.name: Rapid Strike Search
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a Rapid Strike card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. You can't use more than 1 Rapid Strike Search Ability each turn.

abilities.name: Thunderous Awakening
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon has a Memory Capsule attached, Water Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Abilities.

attacks.name: Wild Shock
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 60 damage to itself. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

abilities.name: Spectral Breach
abilities.effect: All Special Energy attached to Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) provide Colorless Energy and have no other effect.

attacks.name: Dede-Flash
attacks.effect: If your opponent has exactly 1 Prize card remaining, this attack does 60 more damage, and your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

abilities.name: Additional Order
abilities.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your turn does not end when you use Café Master.

attacks.name: Rainbow Flavor
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 more damage for each type of basic Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

abilities.name: Spider Net
abilities.effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Evolution Pokémon with their Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

abilities.name: Single Strike Roar
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a Single Strike Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Single Strike Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck. If you attached Energy to a Pokémon in this way, put 2 damage counters on that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Vee-Search
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 3 Pokémon V, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

abilities.name: Primate Wisdom
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may switch a card from your hand with the top card of your deck.

attacks.name: Electrify
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Lightning Energy cards and attach them to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Bolt Storm
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each Lightning Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

abilities.name: Dream Gift
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for an Item card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.

attacks.name: Precious Touch
attacks.effect: Attach an Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, heal 120 damage from that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Max Harmony
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each different type of Pokémon on your Bench.

abilities.name: Dummy Doll
abilities.effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may prevent all damage done to this Mimikyu V by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon until the end of your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Jealous Eyes
attacks.effect: Put 3 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

attacks.name: Ominous Numbers
attacks.effect: Put 4 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like. If you played Acerola's Premonition from your hand during this turn, place 13 damage counters instead.

attacks.name: Max Shadow
attacks.effect: Discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Laser Focus
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Fighting Energy cards and attach them to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Impact Blow
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Impact Blow.

attacks.name: G-Max One Blow
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Strafe
attacks.effect: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Gale Thrust
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 120 more damage.

attacks.name: G-Max Rapid Flow
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 120 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Mean Look
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Moonlight Blade
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 80 more damage.

abilities.name: Dark Signal
abilities.effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon.

cards.name: Acerola's Premonition
cards.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you draw a card for each Trainer card you find there.

cards.name: Café Master
cards.effect: Choose up to 3 of your Benched Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, search your deck for a different type of basic Energy card and attach it to that Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck. Your turn ends.

cards.name: Gloria
cards.effect: Search your deck for up to 3 Basic Pokémon that don't have a Rule Box and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck. (Pokémon V, Pokémon-GX, etc. have Rule Boxes.)

attacks.name: G-Max One Blow
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Gale Thrust
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 120 more damage.

attacks.name: G-Max Rapid Flow
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 120 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
